ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the card (e.g., Visa, MasterCard) */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of the card (e.g., personal, corporate) */,
  "valid_message" TEXT /* Message indicating if the card is valid or not */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the card */,
  "cvv" TEXT /* Card Verification Value (CVV) */,
  "card_holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the cardholder */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the cardholder */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the card is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the card record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the card record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "merchant" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., purchase, refund) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_merchant FOREIGN KEY ("merchant") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_logs" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card that was validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the card is valid */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message related to the validation process */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation performed */,
  "validation_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the validation process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the validation log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the validation log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created, updated) */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object (e.g., card, transaction) */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object that was modified */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client performing the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the audit trail record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the audit trail record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "merchant_category" TEXT /* Category of the merchant (e.g., retail, services) */,
  "merchant_url" TEXT /* URL of the merchant's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the merchant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the merchant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the merchant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, debit card) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_third_party" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is a third-party service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for card type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the card type (e.g., personal, corporate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the card type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the card type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card that was validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation attempt */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the validation process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the card validation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the card validation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failed_transactions" (
  "failed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failed transaction record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the failed transaction */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transaction failure */,
  "failure_date" TEXT /* Date of the failure */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., purchase, refund) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the failed transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the failed transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee charged */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., flat fee, percentage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the fee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the fee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id")
)
